title: Finis
content:
I strove with none, for none was worth my strife.
Nature I loved and, next to Nature, Art:
I warm�d both hands before the fire of life;
It sinks, and I am ready to depart.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Savage Landor, titled "Finis", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
